name: vram-utils
notes_low: Always-on helper nodes: VRAM cleanup, API workflows, and ComfyUI-CacheDiT DiT caching (pair with COMFYUI_FAST=true).
notes_high: Always-on helper nodes: VRAM cleanup between API jobs, CacheDiT acceleration, and bundled subgraphs.
description: Base VRAM/API helpers plus ComfyUI-CacheDiT DiT inference caching (Z-Image, Klein, Qwen-Image, LTX-2, Wan 2.2).
